training.title: Sentra
training.subtitle: — Training Journey
training.description: Watch how we fine-tuned Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct (1.54B params) into a production-grade phishing detector using QLoRA — every hyperparameter, every phase, visualized live.
training.complete: Pipeline complete — Sentra successfully fine-tuned and pushed to HuggingFace

about.heroSubtitle: A focused team of developers and security enthusiasts united by one mission: making the web a safer place — before you even know it needs to be.
about.storyP1: The origins of Sentra are rooted in the rapidly evolving landscape of social engineering. As malicious actors continuously develop more sophisticated tools to harvest personal data, traditional security measures often fall short. The catalyst for Sentra was personal: losing an account to a phishing site that was virtually indistinguishable from the real one.
about.storyP2: That moment highlighted a critical vulnerability — if a site looks perfectly legitimate, even cautious users surrender their information. This realization sparked a deep focus on cybersecurity and a drive to use AI to proactively fight advanced phishing campaigns. After joining forces with partners who shared this passion, we built Sentra.
about.storyQuote: Security should protect you before you even realize you're under attack.
about.archP1: Building something trustworthy enough to protect people required deliberate technical decisions. We recognized early that a simple approach would not withstand today's threat landscape, so we engineered an architecture focused entirely on speed, privacy, and reliability.
about.archP2: We bridged a lightweight browser extension with a high-performance backend via WebSockets for instant communication, and Redis for threat lookups faster than a single frame of video. At the core is a custom LLM pipeline that analyzes emerging threats without ever storing your personal data.
about.teamSubtitle: Click any card to see the full profile, contributions, and tech stack.

quy.name: Thien Quy Pham
quy.affiliation: Computer Science Student at University of Toledo
quy.bio: Cybersecurity and AI engineer securing LLMs and stopping zero-day phishing in real time.
quy.contrib1Desc: Built a DOM-level interception system that catches and disables hidden HTML payloads before they can trick the AI.
quy.contrib2Desc: Pen-tested the LLM with prompt-injection attacks and hardened it to eliminate exploitable vulnerabilities.
quy.contrib3Desc: Integrated the VirusTotal API to cross-check suspicious links against 70+ active antivirus scanners in real-time.

hoang.name: Hoang Nhat Duy Le
hoang.bio: Innovative problem solver with a strong background in backend systems and real-time processing architectures.
hoang.contrib1Desc: Architected the scalable FastAPI backend infrastructure to handle high-volume real-time requests.
hoang.contrib2Desc: Implemented the Redis caching layer to reduce scan latency by 40%.
hoang.contrib3Desc: Designed the AI agentic orchestration logic for browser extensions.

bao.name: Hoang Bao Duy Le
bao.bio: Dedicated engineer focusing on robust integrations, security protocols, and maintaining flawless user experiences.
bao.contrib1: Integrated secure authentication and OAuth pipelines.
bao.contrib2: Developed the rate-limiting and anti-abuse mechanisms.
bao.contrib3: Pioneered the browser extension integration with the Sentra backend via WebSockets.

thanh.name: Thanh Dang Huynh
thanh.bio: Creative developer who bridges the gap between powerful backend logic and beautiful, accessible frontend interfaces.
thanh.contrib1: Built the modern Next.js dashboard and analytic views.
thanh.contrib2: Implemented the Sentra design system and Framer Motion animations.
thanh.contrib3: Constructed the secure Chrome Extension UI and popup logic.

about.contactDesc: Reach out for partnerships, security research collaboration, or questions about integrating Sentra into your organization. We respond to every message.

landing.heroSubtitle: Sentra is an enterprise-grade, AI-driven browser extension that detects and blocks phishing attacks in real time — before you ever realize you're under attack.
landing.featuresDesc: Enterprise-grade protection that installs in under 60 seconds and requires zero configuration.
landing.feature1Body: Trained on over 44,000 diverse emails, our AI engine uses deep contextual understanding to identify malicious intent and neutralize adversarial tricks — achieving up to 90% detection accuracy against zero-day phishing attacks within 20 seconds.
landing.feature2Body: We've optimized our technology to scan for known threats averaging under 800 microseconds — faster than the blink of an eye. Real-time protection directly in your browser with zero perceptible lag.
landing.feature3Body: Security is built into the core, not bolted on. We enforce a zero-trust model where sensitive credentials are never exposed or logged in plain text, with 100% of your data cryptographically hashed and salted.
landing.missionQuote1: We were phished by a site indistinguishable from the real one.
landing.missionQuote2: That moment of helplessness became the founding mission of Sentra.
landing.ctaSubtitle: A silent AI shield that activates before you know you're under attack. No configuration. No interruptions. Just protection.

extension.title: Sentra Phishing Detector
extension.subtitle: Protect your inbox automatically. Install the Sentra extension for Chrome or Edge and get real-time phishing detection on every email.
extension.feature1Desc: Every email you open is scanned instantly — no manual action needed.
extension.feature2Desc: Works seamlessly with Gmail and all Outlook Web variants.
extension.feature3Desc: Color-coded banner shows phishing likelihood and AI reasoning.
extension.step1Desc: Open chrome://extensions (Chrome) or edge://extensions (Edge) and toggle Developer mode on.
extension.step2Desc: Download the latest Sentra Extension package and unzip it to a permanent folder on your machine.
extension.step3Desc: Click Load unpacked and select the unzipped extension/ folder. The Sentra icon will appear in your toolbar.
extension.step4Desc: Click the Sentra toolbar icon and log in with your Sentra credentials. The extension will register your browser automatically.
extension.step5Desc: Navigate to Gmail or Outlook Web and open any email. Sentra will scan it automatically and show a verdict banner.
extension.highRiskMarkers: High risk markers found in this email.
extension.noThreatsDetected: No threats detected in this email.

common2.clickRowHint: Click any row to view full scan details

feed.title: Live Feed
feed.adminSubtitle: All extension instances across all users.
feed.howItWorksDesc: Install the Sentra browser extension, then register a new instance from your Profile Settings. The extension uses the generated token to send periodic heartbeats — this page updates every 10 seconds to reflect which of your devices are currently active.
feed.noInstancesAdminHint: Users can register instances from their Profile Settings page.
